name: Marketing Platform
description: Platform marketing landing page with hero, feature showcase, pricing tiers, testimonials, and documentation hub for multi-tenant SaaS products.

page_briefs.home: Platform landing page with a split hero featuring headline, subtext, and CTA button on the left with a product screenshot or illustration on the right. Feature section with icon cards highlighting key platform capabilities. Pricing tier cards with feature comparison and monthly/annual toggle. Customer testimonial cards with quotes, avatars, and company logos. Final CTA section with sign-up prompt and secondary link to documentation.
page_briefs.docs: Documentation landing page with a content card grid organizing docs by category. Each card shows a category icon, title, brief description, and article count. Categories include Getting Started, API Reference, SDKs, Guides, and Changelog. Search bar at the top for full-text doc search.

shells.top-nav-footer: Top navigation with hero sections and footer for public pages
